questions.text: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.explanation: Mars appears red due to iron oxide (rust) on its surface. It's called the Red Planet.

questions.text: The Moon is a natural satellite of Earth.
questions.explanation: The Moon is Earth's only natural satellite. It revolves around Earth.

questions.correctAnswer: A group of stars forming a recognizable pattern.
questions.explanation: Constellations are patterns formed by stars. Examples: Ursa Major, Orion, Cassiopeia.

questions.text: The planet with beautiful rings around it is ________.
questions.explanation: Saturn has prominent rings made of ice and rock particles. It's the second largest planet.
